intro: Between April 12 and 19, 2026, ZCyberNews published 10 articles on email security, covering a range of high-severity threats. The reporting detailed five high-severity incidents, alongside three medium and two informational alerts, with a global impact across multiple sectors. The technology, hospitality, sports, any-email-sender, and automotive industries were the most frequently affected. This concentration of activity highlights a period of significant focus on vulnerabilities and campaigns targeting email-based systems.
